name: @lism-css/mcp
description: MCP server for lism-css documentation and API reference.

scripts.build: pnpm generate:ai-assets && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/data/docs-index.json dist/data/ && rm -rf dist/data/guides && cp -r src/data/guides dist/data/guides
scripts.prepack: case "$npm_execpath" in *pnpm*) ;; *) echo 'Error: Use pnpm publish' && exit 1;; esac
